eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Eagle, CO; at 4:34 PM on JUL 22, 2026 Effective until 5:34 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Pre-Evacuation Warning: If you are in the area surrounding the evacuation area (zone RFF-522), be prepared to leave on short notice if needed. Pre-Evacuation Warning: If you are in the area surrounding the evacuation area (zone RFF-522), be prepared to leave on short notice if needed.
